name: Installment Sale Gain Deferral

eligibility.description: Applies to dispositions of property where at least one payment is to be received after the close of the taxable year in which the disposition occurs.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows taxpayers to recognize gain from the sale of property over the period in which payments are actually received rather than entirely in the year of sale.
